prompt: Create an ultra-realistic vertical iPhone mirror selfie of a young woman seated casually on a beige modern sofa in a warm, softly lit living room. The composition is waist-up with the lower body almost entirely cropped out, shot through a tall wooden-framed mirror on the left edge of the image. She wears a fitted light blue half-sleeve crew-neck top with subtle fabric wrinkles, a delicate gold necklace, small gold hoop earrings, and natural pale pink manicured nails. Her dark brown hair is tied back in a neat low ponytail with a few loose strands around the face. She holds a beige/silver iPhone with three rear cameras in her right hand at chest height, angled slightly outward, partially covering the right side of her face. Add a solid rectangular warm brown block over the center of her face, obscuring facial identity. The room has beige walls, a window behind her with daylight and blinds, a framed picture on the wall to the right, a second mirror or framed object in the background, wooden textures, and a clean cozy lived-in interior. Use soft natural indoor daylight with warm color grading, gentle shadows, shallow depth of field, slight mirror reflection imperfections, subtle grain, realistic skin texture, and an authentic casual front-camera selfie look.
